ui.label: Actuation Force
ui.tooltip_md: Force required to actuate the switch.

ui.label: Adjustable Feet
ui.tooltip_md: Built-in foot positions for height adjustment.

ui.label: Analog Input
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the keyboard can output analog or controller-style input.

ui.label: Arrow Keys
ui.tooltip_md: Whether dedicated arrow keys are present.

ui.label: Backlighting
ui.tooltip_md: Backlight class supported by the keyboard.

ui.label: Battery Capacity
ui.tooltip_md: Nominal battery capacity for wireless keyboards.

ui.label: Battery Life (Lighting Off)
ui.tooltip_md: Battery life estimate with lighting disabled.

ui.label: Battery Life (Lighting On)
ui.tooltip_md: Battery life estimate with lighting enabled.

ui.label: Charging Method
ui.tooltip_md: How the keyboard recharges or receives replaceable power.

ui.label: Color
ui.tooltip_md: Factory color options or primary colorway.

ai_assist.reasoning_note:
Discover every color variant this product is or has been available in.
Check the manufacturer product page (color selectors, variant dropdowns, "available in" sections), major retailers (Amazon, Best Buy, Newegg), and review/spec databases. Include discontinued and regional variants.

Each color is either a single atom ("black", "light-gray") or multiple atoms joined by "+" in dominant visual order.
Dominant means the color with the most surface area — "black+red" means mostly black with red accents.
The first color in the array is the most common / default variant (the one shown on the product's main marketing page).

Formatting rules:
- lowercase only, hyphens between words
- Modifier-first: "light-blue" not "blue-light", "dark-green" not "green-dark"
- Normalize "grey" to "gray"
- Translate marketing names to the nearest registered color. "Midnight" → "black", "Arctic" → "white", "Thunderbolt Yellow" → "yellow". Never use marketing names as atoms.

Base colors (also valid with prefixes dark-, light-): amber, blue, brown, coral, cyan, emerald, fuchsia, gray, green, indigo, lime, olive, orange, pink, purple, red, rose, sky, slate, stone, teal, violet, yellow. Other colors: beige, black, gold, ivory, lavender, magenta, maroon, navy, salmon, silver, turquoise, white.

Registered colors with hex values: amber, beige, black, blue, brown, coral, cyan, dark-blue, dark-brown, dark-cyan, dark-fuchsia, dark-gray, dark-green, dark-indigo, dark-lime, dark-orange, dark-pink, dark-purple, dark-red, dark-rose, dark-sky, dark-slate, dark-stone, dark-teal, dark-violet, dark-yellow, emerald, fuchsia, gold, gray, green, indigo, ivory, lavender, light-amber, light-blue, light-brown, light-coral, light-cyan, light-emerald, light-fuchsia, light-gray, light-green, light-indigo, light-lime, light-olive, light-orange, light-pink, light-purple, light-red, light-rose, light-sky, light-slate, light-stone, light-teal, light-violet, light-yellow, lime, magenta, maroon, navy, olive, orange, pink, purple, red, rose, salmon, silver, sky, slate, stone, teal, turquoise, violet, white, yellow

Match product colors to registered colors by visual similarity using the hex values above. If a registered color's hex is close to the product's actual color, use the registered name.
If no registered color is a reasonable visual match, use the nearest registered color by hex similarity. Do not invent new color names.

ui.label: Colors
ui.tooltip_md: EG-compatible colorway tokens. Lowercase + hyphens only. Multi-color variants use "+" (e.g. black+red). Must match canonical EG palette. Normalize grey→gray.

ui.label: Compatible OS
ui.tooltip_md: Operating systems or platforms officially supported.

ui.label: Detachable Cable
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the wired cable can be removed from the keyboard.

ui.label: Discontinued
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the product is no longer sold by the manufacturer.

ai_assist.reasoning_note:
Discover every special, limited, or collaboration edition of this product.
Check the manufacturer product page, retailers, and community forums. Include discontinued and limited-run editions.

Each edition has its own color variant(s). When you find an edition, identify the colors it comes in — those colors must appear in the colors array using the same atom rules (registered atoms, "+"-joined, dominant-first). Every edition adds at least one color entry to the product's color list.

Formatting: return editions as kebab-case slugs. Lowercase, hyphens only, no spaces.
Examples: launch-edition, cyberpunk-2077-edition, sf6-chun-li, wilderness, halo-infinite-edition.
Do not return display names or title case.
If an edition has a unique color not in the registered list, map it to the nearest registered color by hex similarity.

ui.label: Editions
ui.tooltip_md: EG-compatible edition slugs. Kebab-case only (lowercase, hyphens, no spaces). Examples: cyberpunk-2077-edition, sf6-chun-li, wilderness.

ui.label: Function Row
ui.tooltip_md: Whether a dedicated F-row is present.

ui.label: Gasket Mount
ui.tooltip_md: Whether a gasket isolation mount is used.

ui.label: GTIN
ui.tooltip_md: Trade identifier such as UPC or EAN.

ui.label: Front Height
ui.tooltip_md: Keyboard height at the front edge.

ui.label: Rear Height
ui.tooltip_md: Keyboard height at the rear edge.

ui.label: Hot-Swappable
ui.tooltip_md: Whether switches can be swapped without soldering.

ui.label: Media Controls
ui.tooltip_md: Type of dedicated media playback and volume controls.

ui.label: Multi-Device Pairing
ui.tooltip_md: How many wireless devices can be stored.

ui.label: Multi-Device Pairing Count
ui.tooltip_md: How many devices can be stored for quick switching.

ui.label: Onboard Profile Count
ui.tooltip_md: How many profiles can be stored locally.

ui.label: OS Mode Switch
ui.tooltip_md: Dedicated switch or shortcut for Windows/macOS mode.

ui.label: Per-Key RGB
ui.tooltip_md: Whether each key can be lit independently.

ui.label: Price Range
ui.tooltip_md: Typical launch or current street-price band.

ui.label: QMK / VIA Support
ui.tooltip_md: Open firmware and live remapping support.

ui.label: Scan Rate
ui.tooltip_md: Internal keyboard scan rate when disclosed separately from polling rate.

ui.label: Software Required
ui.tooltip_md: Whether software is required for headline features.

ui.label: Sound Dampening
ui.tooltip_md: Level of factory sound dampening treatment.

ui.label: South-Facing LEDs
ui.tooltip_md: Whether the PCB uses south-facing LEDs.

ui.label: Stabilizer Mount
ui.tooltip_md: How the stabilizers mount to the plate or PCB.

ui.label: Switch Compatibility
ui.tooltip_md: Which switch families or magnetic formats the board supports.

ui.label: Switch Lifespan
ui.tooltip_md: Rated lifetime in millions of keystrokes.

ui.label: Switch Pin Support
ui.tooltip_md: Which MX-style switch pin formats the PCB accepts.

ui.label: Weight
ui.tooltip_md: Keyboard weight including the main chassis.

notes: Generated by Field Rules Studio compiler.
Canonical runtime contract used by ingestion and extraction.

boolean_yes_no_unk.description: Parse yes/no/true/false/1/0 tokens. Output boolean or 'unk'.

component_reference.description: Match a component entity name/alias against a component_db type; output canonical component name.

date_field.description: Parse date strings to ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD) when possible.

list_numbers_or_ranges_with_unit.description: Parse mixed lists containing numbers and ranges (e.g. '1-3, 4'). Canonical output is list of intervals {min,max}.

list_of_numbers_with_unit.description: Parse list of numbers with optional unit into list<number> (or list<int>) in target unit.

list_of_tokens_delimited.description: Parse delimited tokens into list<string> with optional token_map normalization.

number_with_unit.description: Parse a single number with optional unit. Convert to target unit when allowed.

url_field.description: Parse and validate URL. Normalize by trimming and ensuring scheme.

data_values.notes: Observed values across products; can be used for suggestion/inference but not strict enums.

field_catalog.notes: Column B holds field keys; columns C+ hold product values.
